case_title: TRACEY, CHARLES M. vs. MILAN, THIANDD AKA MILAN, TONY et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRACEY, CHARLES M. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-19-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-26-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

3:30 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT CHARLES M. TRACEY WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD AND HIS BROTHER JOHN TRACEY. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT SPAULDING HOTEL 240 O'FARRELL STREET RM.#616 S.F. CA. WRIT TO ISSUE NOW. PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED TO 8/11/93 9:00 A.M. ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS IN COURT MINUTES RECORDED BY JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER AND HEARD BY PRO TEM JUDGE, ALVIN J. SCHIFRIN.

COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY A COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE EX PARTE APLLICATION FOR ORDER VACATING UNLAWFUL DETAINER JU DGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AND DISMISSING CASE WITH, ETC FILED BY DEFENDANT MILAN, THIANDD AKA MILAN, TONY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRACEY, CHARLES M. AS TO DEFENDANT MILAN, THIANDD AKA MILAN, TONY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MILAN, THIANDD AKA MILAN, TONY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MILAN, THIANDD AKA MILAN, TONY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILAN, THIANDD AKA MILAN, TONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 O'FARRELL STREET #616 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL AUG-11-1993, WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 8/11/93 AFTER 9:00 P.M. JUDGMENT TO BE VACATED IT DEFT. COMPLIES WITH ALL CONDITIONS. NO OTHER ADULTS CLAIM A RIGHT TO POSSESS. NEITHER PARTY ADMITS LIABILITY. THERE IS A GENERAL RELEASE BY ALL PARTIES IN THE ACTION. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
